title: TMDB Movie Keywords Exploded — Full Lexicon Scores
subtitle: ~957K rows: one per (movie, keyword) with all NRC + SCL scores
description:
## TMDB Movie Keywords Exploded

One row per (movie, keyword) pair — every TMDB keyword for every movie, joined with the full keyword lexicon (NRC Emotion, NRC Emotion Intensity, NRC VAD v2.1, SCL-OPP).

## Pipeline

```
tmdb-movies-clean (1.17M movies, 284K with keywords)
  → explode keywords (~957K pairs)
  → join tmdb-keyword-lexicon
```

## Column prefix convention

| Prefix | Source |
|--------|--------|
| `emolex_` | NRC Emotion Lexicon (binary emotion membership) |
| `intensity_` | NRC Emotion Intensity Lexicon (0–1 continuous) |
| `vad_` | NRC VAD Lexicon v2.1 (valence/arousal/dominance, −1 to +1) |
| `scl_` | SCL-OPP / SCL-NMA (phrase composition, opposing polarity) |

## Key columns

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `keyword` | TMDB plot keyword |
| `keyword_valence` | Best available valence for this keyword (SCL overrides VAD) |
| `keyword_valence_source` | Where valence came from: scl, vad, or null |
| `keyword_valence_scale` | Scale of valence score |
| `vad_valence` | NRC VAD valence (−1 to +1) |
| `vad_arousal` | NRC VAD arousal (−1 to +1) |
| `vad_dominance` | NRC VAD dominance (−1 to +1) |
| `scl_composition_shift` | Phrase valence − mean token valence (compositional surprise) |
| `scl_composition_type` | Linguistic mechanism: direct, opposing_polarity, idiomatic, ... |
| `quality` | Movie quality label |
| `theatrical` | True = theatrical/streaming release |

## Related datasets

- [TMDB Movie Scores](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/bdelanghe/tmdb-movie-scores) — movie-level aggregates
- [TMDB Keyword Lexicon](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/bdelanghe/tmdb-keyword-lexicon) — keyword-level scores (standalone)
- [TMDB Movies — Clean & Current](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/bdelanghe/tmdb-movies-clean) — source movie corpus

## Source

https://github.com/bdelanghe/imdb-kaggle

Lexicons by Saif M. Mohammad (NRC Canada): NRC Emotion Lexicon, NRC Emotion Intensity Lexicon, NRC VAD Lexicon v2.1, SCL-OPP, SCL-NMA.
